creator: cwf-ml@gmx.net
text:
The Quagga port's start script apparently somehow sets

net.inet.ip.forwarding: 1
net.inet6.ip6.forwarding: 1

even when the port is not enabled in /etc/rc.conf
(which is a security problem AND which breaks ipv6 
router discovery)

Seen on FreeBSD 9.3:

FreeBSD bbclientpub1.whatever 9.3-RELEASE-p30 FreeBSD 9.3-RELEASE-p30 #0: Mon Nov  2 10:11:50 UTC 2015     root@amd64-builder.daemonology.net:/usr/obj/usr/src/sys/GENERIC  amd64
